final:
module my_inverter (
    input  A   ,
    output Z   ,
    input  TE  ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
);

  wire A_bar;
  assign A_bar = ~A;

  assign Z = TE ? A_bar : A;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Z <= A; if (TE) begin Z <= A_bar; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Z <= A; if (TE) begin Z <= A_bar; end
